name: AA_SATIS_DURUMU_123
definition:
--USE [TIGER3]
--GO

--/****** Object:  View [dbo].[AA_SATIS_DURUMU_123]    Script Date: 15.11.2023 14:46:38 ******/
--SET ANSI_NULLS ON
--GO

--SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
--GO

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_SATIS_DURUMU_123] AS

SELECT
P.CODE 'PROJE KODU'
,P.NAME 'FATURA ISMI'
,ISNULL((SELEct SUM(TUTAR) FROM [AA_SARF_PROJE_123] WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=P.CODE AND RECETE_TURU='STANDART'),0) 'STANDART MALIYETI'
,ISNULL((SELEct SUM(TUTAR) FROM [AA_SARF_PROJE_123] WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=P.CODE AND RECETE_TURU='OPSIYONEL'),0) 'OPSIYON MALIYETI'
,ISNULL((SELEct SUM(TUTAR) FROM [AA_SARF_PROJE_123] WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=P.CODE AND RECETE_TURU='ARABA'),0) 'ARAÇ MALIYETI'
,ISNULL((SELEct SUM(TUTAR) FROM [AA_SARF_PROJE_123] WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=P.CODE AND RECETE_TURU='OTV'),0) 'VERGI MALIYETI'
,ISNULL((SELEct SUM(TUTAR) FROM [AA_SARF_PROJE_123] WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=P.CODE),0) 'TOPLAM MALIYET'
,ISNULL((select sum(LINENET) from LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE TRCODE=1 AND LINENO_=1 AND PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF),0) 'STANDART SATIŞ' 
,ISNULL((select sum(LINENET) from LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE TRCODE=1 AND  LINENO_<>1 AND PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF),0)-(SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WHERE STGRPCODE='ARABA')) 'OPSIYON SATIŞ' 
,(SELECT SUM(TOTAL) FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF AND STOCKREF IN (SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_123_ITEMS WHERE STGRPCODE='ARABA')) ARAC_SATIS
,ISNULL((select sum(LINENET) from LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE TRCODE=1 AND  PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF),0) 'TOPLAM GELIR'  
,ISNULL((select sum(LINENET) from LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE TRCODE=1 AND  PROJECTREF=P.LOGICALREF),0)-
ISNULL((SELEct SUM(TUTAR) FROM [AA_SARF_PROJE_123] WHERE IS_EMRI_N0=P.CODE),0)  KAZANC

--,P.LOGICALREF
FROM LG_123_PROJECT AS P
WHERE 
P.LOGICALREF IN (SELECT PROJECTREF FROM LG_123_01_INVOICE WHERE TRCODE IN (7,8,9))
--AND P.CODE='GXL009'


--SELECT * FROM LG_123_01_ORFICHE WHERE FICHENO='000054'
sample_data: ATLANDI: Exception calling "Fill" with "1" argument(s): "Yürütme Zaman Aşımı Süresi Doldu. Zaman aşımı süresi işlem tamamlanmadan önce doldu veya sunucu yanıt vermiyor."
